heading: Eligibility: individuals entitled to benefits under the GI Bill program for members of the Selected Reserve
label: 7652 Eligibility: individuals entitled to benefits under the GI Bill program for members of the Selected Reserve
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “7603” for “4303” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 102–40section 4352 of this title
amendments: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “7603” for “4303” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 102–40section 4352 of this title

children.text: the individual is entitled to benefits under chapter 106 of title 10; and
the score of the individual on the Armed Forces Qualification Test was above the 50th percentile.
